name: agentguard-vs-cxx
description: AgentGuard multi-project workflow controls for scoped, verified, auditable AI coding tasks.
author: AgentGuardVS-CXX contributors

interface.shortDescription: Guardrails and audit workflow for multi-project agent edits.
interface.longDescription: Runs AgentGuardVS-CXX project-profile analyze, verify, and review workflows so Codex can scope changes, restrict edits to allowed files, run MSBuild or configured command verification, and report audit artifacts. Visual Studio C++ is the mature path; other project types depend on ProjectProfile and verify_commands.
capabilities: ProjectProfile detection for Visual Studio C++, CMake, Python, Node, .NET, Java, Unreal, and custom projects
Semantic scope analysis for isolated workspaces
